title: tephroseris caucasigena
intro: Tephroseris caucasigena, also known as Caucasus mountain everlasting, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Caucasus region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tephroseris caucasigena include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-bacterial properties. Tephroseris caucasigena is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
